_meta.verificationNote: AI Generated: Control domains derived from BNM Management of Customer Information and Permitted Disclosures policy structure. Organisations should adapt to their specific operating context.

governance-and-oversight.name: Governance & Oversight
governance-and-oversight.description: Board and senior management oversight of customer information protection, including tone-at-the-top, policy approval, management reporting, and annual assurance

risk-assessment.name: Risk Assessment
risk-assessment.description: Identification and assessment of threats and vulnerabilities to customer information, including likelihood-impact analysis, proportionality, and mitigation planning

policies-and-procedures.name: Policies & Procedures
policies-and-procedures.description: Establishment, communication, and continuous review of written policies and procedures governing the full lifecycle of customer information

ict-controls.name: ICT Controls
ict-controls.description: Preventive and detective ICT controls to safeguard customer information, including monitoring, deterrent mechanisms, social media restrictions, and detection of unauthorised activity

access-controls.name: Access Controls
access-controls.description: Role-based access profiles, multi-level access controls across applications, databases, operating systems, and networks, and periodic access reviews and revocation

physical-security.name: Physical Security
physical-security.description: Physical protection of customer information in paper and electronic forms, restricted area controls, intruder deterrents, and clear-desk policies

data-disposal.name: Data Disposal
data-disposal.description: Secure lifecycle disposal of customer information including identification of redundant data, secure destruction methods, outsourced destruction oversight, and chain of custody

staff-awareness-training.name: Staff Awareness & Training
staff-awareness-training.description: Employee and external vendor personnel awareness, confidentiality undertakings, training programmes, effectiveness measurement, and disciplinary frameworks

independent-review.name: Independent Review
independent-review.description: Biennial independent review of policies, procedures, and controls, including assessment of senior management effectiveness and communication of findings

breach-management.name: Breach Management
breach-management.description: Customer information breach handling and response plans, escalation procedures, BNM notification, impact assessment, investigation, customer notification, and breach register maintenance

outsourced-service-providers.name: Outsourced Service Providers
outsourced-service-providers.description: Due diligence, SLA requirements, OSP monitoring, NDA obligations, personnel vetting, training, biennial reviews, and audit rights for outsourced service providers handling customer information

permitted-disclosure.name: Permitted Disclosure
permitted-disclosure.description: Controls governing lawful disclosure of customer information including consent management, cross-border transfers, regulatory disclosures, and disclosure record-keeping
